rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'Rec.t by Banker in London' as it accurately reflects the 't' and period in 'Rec.t', visually confirmed. Other fields were identical across extractors.

Amount values (50, 0, 0) were in consensus and visually confirmed as clear. Description was constructed by visual verification: 'Each.t' (best reading of the first word, overriding both partial readings), 'Anny' (from gpt-5-mini, visually confirmed), '1/4' (from gemini-flash, chosen for contextual accuracy as 'quarter' is common for annuity calculations, over gpt-5-mini's literal but ambiguous character reading '19l'), 'Mids.t' and the long dash '—' (from gpt-5-mini, visually confirmed). Gpt-5-mini's notes were helpful in identifying ambiguity.
rows.english_description: Exchequer annuity payment for the quarter ending at Midsummer 1790.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Exchequer annuity payment for the quarter ending at Midsummer 1790, amounting to £50 0s 0d.

rows.description: Interest of £1714: 3 pr Cent for 1/4 to Mids.t —

Gpt-5-mini's notes were helpful in identifying ambiguity.
